title: Spear Indicator
description: Adds a HUD Element to Display Spear Information
body:
This Mod adds a number how much dmg you will deal with your Spear to a maxed armour opponent above you hotbar. 
In further versions I will ad other usefull Displays.
Currently there is no way to Toggle so be aware of that if you add it.

Also check out this far more usefull mod of me:
[SkyVision](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyvision)
